examples: As in the particle in a box, it is the boundary conditions that force us to quantize the energy.
Song editing functions include both event and track-based tools like quantize, swing, remap, controller scaling and more.
For very low bit rate speech coding algorithms, it is important to quantize these parameters accurately using as few bits as possible.
Quantize: DJs will never miss a beat again as the quantize function automatically synchronises the beat of rekordbox-ready tracks and effects.
This is where we break out onto the outer black buttons, which (among other things) contain controls for quantize, delete and -- thankfully for us -- undo.
